_note: Template vars {{event_id}}, {{event_name}}, {{booth}} are supplied as positional args to agent.py
name: TCG Agent {{event_name}}
index_description: Pokemon cards in the {{event_name}} vending machine. Use for inventory and pricing queries.

replicas.description: Pokemon cards sorted by estimated value ascending (lowest price first).
Pokemon cards sorted by estimated value descending (highest price first).

clientSideTools.name: check_card_inventory
clientSideTools.description: Check how many of a specific Pokemon card are available or claimed in the vending machine. Returns all matching cards with their current inventory count. Use this when asked about availability, quantities, or whether a specific card is still in the machine.

query.description: Pokemon card name to search for (e.g. 'Charizard ex')
